---
title: "Trackers IA"
listing:
  id: aitrackerslist
  contents: ai-trackers
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  sort: "title"
  page-size: 12
  fields: [image, title, description, categories, update]
  filter-ui: false
  categories: false
---

Suivez ici nos indicateurs dédiés à l'intelligence artificielle : diffusion, adoption et impact sur l'économie et l'emploi.

### Nos trackers IA

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  const root = document.getElementById('listing-aitrackerslist');
  if (!root) return;

  root.querySelectorAll('.quarto-grid-item.card').forEach(card => {
    const table = card.querySelector('.card-other-values');
    const updateCell = table?.querySelector('td.update');
    const update = updateCell ? updateCell.textContent.trim() : '';
    const body = card.querySelector('.card-body');
    if (!body) return;

    const title = body.querySelector('.card-title');
    const categories = body.querySelector('.listing-categories');

    if (update) {
      const badge = document.createElement('span');
      const isComingSoon = update.toLowerCase() === 'à venir';
      badge.className = isComingSoon ? 'badge badge-coming-soon' : 'badge tracker-update-badge';
      badge.textContent = isComingSoon ? 'À venir' : `MAJ ${update}`;
      if (isComingSoon) {
        card.setAttribute('data-coming-soon', 'true');
      }
      if (categories) {
        categories.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', badge);
      } else if (title) {
        title.insertAdjacentElement('beforebegin', badge);
      } else {
        body.insertBefore(badge, body.firstChild);
      }
    }

    if (table) table.remove();
  });
});
</script>
